cards.rules_text:
Vigilance
Whenever Kadmos or another storied permanent you control enters, create a 1/1 white Human creature token. [i](Enchantments and legendary creatures are storied.)[/i]

Flying
[i]Threshold[/i] — When Thoughtbreaker Sirens enters, look at the top two cards of your library. Put up to one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Then if there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, create two 1/1 black Siren creature tokens with flying and “This creature can't block.”

Haste
[i]Macabre [/i]— Whenever Blade of Hetos attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it if you've sacrificed a nonland permanent this turn.

When Herald of Revelry enters, create a Gold token. [i](It's an artifact with “Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.”)[/i]
{3}{R}{G}: Until end of turn, target creature gets +2/+2 and must be blocked each combat if able. Activate only as a sorcery.
Other enchantment creatures you control get +1/+1.
cards.flavor_text: [i]I'll put a Nyx effect on this later.[/i]

cards.rules_text: [i]Battalion[/i] — Whenever Nyxborn Valiant and at least two other creatures attack, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature. It gains indestructible until end of turn.

Whenever Siren Sea Pillager attacks, target creature can't block this turn.
Whenever two or more creatures you control deal damage to a player, you may discard a card. if you do, draw two cards.

When Pharika's Fanatic enters, create an Altar token. [i](It's an artifact with “{3}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a 3/2 Demigod enchantment creature token that's all colors. Activate only as a sorcery.”)[/i]
[i]Macabre [/i]— At the beginning of your end step, if you've sacrificed a nonland permanent this turn, create a 1/1 black Snake creature token with deathtouch.

When Glory of Iroas enters, create a 2/2 white Pegasus creature token with flying. It gains haste until end of turn.
Paired creatures you control get +1/+1.
Whenever the final chapter ability of a Saga you control resolves, create a 2/2 blue Merfolk Knight enchantment creature token.

When Meletian Starseer enters, look at the top four cards of your library, You may reveal a storied card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. [i](Enchantments and legendary creatures are storied.)[/i]

When Trapped in the Underworld enters, mill two cards. [i](Put the top two cards of your library into your graveyard.)[/i]
[i]Threshold[/i] — At the beginning of your end step, if there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, create a tapped 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

Whenever Snarling Cerberus attacks, you may sacrifice another creature or enchantment. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Until end of turn, it can't be blocked except by three or more creatures.

Reach, trample
Each creature you control that's a Cyclops or Giant has trample.

When Setessan Vitalists enters, create an Altar token. [i](It's an artifact with “{3}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a 3/2 Demigod enchantment creature token that's all colors. Activate only as a sorcery.”)[/i]
Whenever another creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Monsoon Mutineers. Each opponent loses 1 life. This ability triggers only once each turn.
cards.flavor_text: [i]“Our hands guided the sail, our backs hauled the oars! Why should Callaphe claim all the glory in Nyx?”[/i]

{2}{B}{G}, Exile two other cards from your graveyard: Return Vengeful Phylaskia from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped with a finality counter on it. [i](If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.)[/i]

You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield.
